query:
INSERT INTO actor_document_links (actor_id, document_id, role, confidence, extracted_from, added_by)
VALUES
  -- Breslow appears in hearing transcripts, motions to disqualify, and competency orders
  (90001, 210001, 'presiding_judge', 100, 'Dec 5, 2024 Young/Faretta/Competency Hearing Transcript', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 210007, 'subject', 100, 'Motion to Disqualify Judge Breslow, Dec 2024 Pro Se Pack', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 210009, 'subject', 100, 'Bad Faith Motions Pack — Breslow conduct documented', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 180002, 'presiding_judge', 95, 'Exhibit Index references Breslow hearings throughout', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 240001, 'defendant', 90, 'ECF 45 — named defendant in federal civil rights action', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 240002, 'defendant', 90, 'ECF 45-1 — Faretta violations attributed to Breslow', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 240008, 'subject', 100, 'ECF 48-1 — Dec 5 transcript submitted as federal exhibit documenting Breslow conduct', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 240009, 'referenced', 85, 'ECF 49 — dismissal order references Breslow state court proceedings', 'goblin'),
  (90001, 240020, 'defendant', 100, 'Federal Case Summary — Breslow named as primary defendant', 'goblin'),
  -- Aziz Merchant appears in prosecution filings and bad faith motions
  (90002, 210009, 'subject', 100, 'Bad Faith Motions Pack — Merchant prosecutorial conduct documented', 'goblin'),
  (90002, 210008, 'prosecutor', 90, 'Jan-Mar 2025 Filings — Merchant as lead prosecutor', 'goblin'),
  (90002, 180002, 'prosecutor', 90, 'Exhibit Index — Merchant named as lead prosecutor', 'goblin'),
  (90002, 240001, 'defendant', 90, 'ECF 45 — Merchant named as defendant in federal action', 'goblin'),
  (90002, 240002, 'defendant', 90, 'ECF 45-1 — prosecutorial misconduct attributed to Merchant', 'goblin'),
  (90002, 240020, 'defendant', 100, 'Federal Case Summary — Merchant named as defendant', 'goblin'),
  -- Hicks (DA) appears in DA office correspondence and federal case
  (90003, 210004, 'subject', 90, 'Hicks Email Pack — DA Hicks correspondence documented', 'goblin'),
  (90003, 240001, 'defendant', 85, 'ECF 45 — DA Hicks office named in federal action', 'goblin'),
  (90003, 240020, 'defendant', 85, 'Federal Case Summary — Hicks named as defendant', 'goblin'),
  -- Carrico (conflict counsel) appears in motions and hearing docs
  (90011, 210006, 'defense_counsel', 90, 'Transcripts Collection 2024 — Carrico as conflict counsel', 'goblin'),
  (90011, 180002, 'defense_counsel', 85, 'Exhibit Index — Carrico appointed as conflict counsel', 'goblin'),
  -- Hutt (APD) appears in early 2024 filings
  (90009, 210006, 'defense_counsel', 90, 'Transcripts Collection 2024 — Hutt as APD counsel', 'goblin'),
  (90009, 180002, 'defense_counsel', 85, 'Exhibit Index — Hutt as APD counsel', 'goblin'),
  -- Meredith (Pretrial Services) appears in text log
  (90014, 210003, 'pretrial_officer', 100, 'Meredith Text Log — Meredith as pretrial services officer', 'goblin'),
  -- Coyle (forensic evaluator) appears in competency docs
  (90015, 180002, 'forensic_evaluator', 85, 'Exhibit Index — Coyle first competency evaluation', 'goblin'),
  -- Pinkerman (forensic evaluator) appears in competency docs
  (90016, 180002, 'forensic_evaluator', 85, 'Exhibit Index — Pinkerman second competency evaluation', 'goblin'),
  -- Foerster (forensic evaluator) appears in competency docs
  (90017, 180002, 'forensic_evaluator', 85, 'Exhibit Index — Foerster third competency evaluation', 'goblin'),
  -- Figueroa (defense counsel) appears in 2025 filings
  (90012, 210011, 'defense_counsel', 90, 'Jul-Aug 2025 Counsel Withdrawal Pack — Figueroa withdrawal', 'goblin'),
  (90012, 210010, 'defense_counsel', 85, 'Apr-Jun 2025 In-Custody Pack — Figueroa as counsel', 'goblin'),
  -- Joel Merchant (defense counsel, not prosecutor) appears in late 2025 filings
  (90013, 210012, 'defense_counsel', 85, 'Sep-Nov 2025 Filings — Joel Merchant as counsel', 'goblin'),
  (90013, 210013, 'defense_counsel', 85, 'Sep 2025-May 2026 Most Recent Pack — Joel Merchant as counsel', 'goblin');
